summary: IT Specialist & Technical Support Engineer with a proactive approach to problem-solving and providing L1-L2 support. Highly reliable, adaptable to new systems, and passionate about providing exceptional technical support and optimizing workflows.

Systems Engineer and System Administrator with hands-on experience in multi-site Windows environments, Active Directory, and VMware. Known for managing identity lifecycles, maintaining composure under pressure, and delivering robust infrastructure solutions.

Computer Science graduate (B.Sc.) and AWS Certified IT professional with a strong foundation in Python, C++, and infrastructure virtualization. Passionate about transitioning into Cloud and DevOps roles, bringing a developer's mindset to system administration and automation.

bullets: Supporting a complex multi-site Windows environment serving over 1000 end-users.
Manage identity lifecycle, permission models, and Group Policies using Active Directory.
Provision, configure, and maintain VMware Virtual Machines (VMs), including snapshot management and resource allocation.
Administer and support remote DaaS sessions and Citrix environments to ensure seamless remote access.
Provide advanced L1-L2 technical support, troubleshooting hardware, software, and TCP/IP networking protocols.
Manage and support Microsoft Exchange services and mailboxes for enterprise users.
Continuously optimize daily workflows and quickly adapt to new internal systems to reduce ticket resolution times.

education.institution: The Academic College of Tel Aviv�Yafo

projects.name: Academic / Personal Project Name
projects.description: Describe a project from your B.Sc. degree or a home lab that uses Python, C++, or AWS. E.g., 'Developed a web application using Python...'
